label: New
items: A dedicated Calendar section brings your task calendar, weather forecast, and recurring care routines together in one place — open it from the main navigation.

label: Improved
items: The home Dashboard is now calmer and focused on your day — the Calendar and Weather views moved into the new Calendar section (your old links still work).
"Planner" is now "Plan" — your plans and shopping lists, together.

label: Fixed
items: Ailment treatment and prevention now list each step on its own, instead of collapsing several steps into one.
